steps.title: Identify the causal relationship
steps.content: The passage opens with a fundamental human trait—”We are creatures of the sun. We love light and life”—and immediately states the reason for urban migration: “That is why we crowd into towns and cities.” This causal link from human nature to settlement patterns is the main signal.

steps.title: Match the purpose to the answer
steps.content: Choice A captures the passage's main purpose—it explains the human trait that drives urban migration. Choices B and C reverse the passage's logic, while D adds a warning the passage doesn't make. That matches choice A — A is correct.
